8.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:P/VC:H/VI:H/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "A missing output encoding call in print_all_bug_page_word.php allows any authenticated user to inject arbitrary HTML into an IMG tag's *alt* attribute via an image attachment with a crafted filename such as `probe." onload="alert(1)`. When any user views the HTML export page (print_all_bug_page_word.php?type_page=html&export=1), the rendered IMG tag becomes ``, breaking out of the alt attribute. ### Impact Cross-site scripting. Impact is limited by MantisBT's Content Security Policy. ### Patches - https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt/commit/bdd0e364f62759de272dfd4c89b4f51d27be9daa ### Workarounds None ### Resources - https://mantisbt.org/bugs/view.php?id=37234 ### Credits MantisBT thanks the [Dracosec Research Limited](https://dracosec.tech/) team (Chris Chan, Krecendo Hui, William Lam) for discovering and responsibly reporting the issue.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-h2wf-967x-gxvw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-15T18:56:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h2wf-967x-gxvw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-h2wf-967x-gxvw"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-62944"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-15T18:56:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt/security/advisories/GHSA-h2wf-967x-gxvw", "https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt/commit/bdd0e364f62759de272dfd4c89b4f51d27be9daa", "https://mantisbt.org/bugs/view.php?id=37234", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-h2wf-967x-gxvw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/mantisbt/mantisbt/security-advisories/GHSA-h2wf-967x-gxvw", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt", "summary": "MantisBT: Stored XSS in print_all_bug_page_word.php", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-15T18:56:00Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-h2wf-967x-gxvw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.28.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "mantisbt/mantisbt"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.28.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
